hero_subtitle: Day & Night Wellness from the Earth's Core.

left_card_desc:
Volcanic Dawn is the core morning system within the dual-cycle lineup, meticulously developed as a premium, high-contrast coffee alternative. Formulated to deliver sustained physical energy, mental clarity, and deep focus without the jagged spikes or subsequent crashes typical of traditional espresso, it acts as a functional transition ritual for the start of the day.

The blend features a distinct, rich profile centered around ancestral sourcing and high-solubility functional botanicals:

  • The Core Base: Built on a foundation of traditional Koko Samoa (Samoan roasted cacao beans), offering an authentic, full-bodied, earthy, and aromatic profile.
  • Texture & Sustained Energy: Balanced with Taro Powder for smooth body and mouthfeel, alongside clean, focused stimulation driven by premium Green Tea.
  • The Spice & Mineral Track: Elevated by a precise accent track of Cinnamon, Cardamom, and a finishing touch of mineral-rich Black Lava Salt to tie the volcanic narrative directly to the flavor profile.

The entire blend is structurally framed as a clean, daily beverage ritual—providing 30 complete servings (Net Wt. 7.0 oz) designed to perfectly anchor the high-energy morning half of the geothermal wellness system.
right_card_desc:
Obsidian Bed is the core evening system within the dual-cycle lineup, meticulously developed as a premium restorative sleep blend. Formulated to promote deep relaxation, neural recovery, and metabolic restoration without the heavy dependency or morning grogginess typical of traditional sleep aids, it acts as a functional grounding ritual to close the day.

The blend features a distinct, rich profile centered around calming ancestral sourcing and high-bioavailability functional botanicals:

  • The Core Base: Built on a foundation of traditional Koko Samoa (Samoan roasted cacao beans), offering an authentic, full-bodied, earthy, and aromatic profile.
  • Texture & Sleep Support: Balanced with Taro Powder for smooth body and rich mouthfeel, alongside clean, healthy fats driven by premium Macadamia Nut.
  • The Calm & Recovery Track: Elevated by a precise accent track of Light Spices, Coconut Palm Sugar, and nutrient-dense Bee Pollen to support overnight metabolic restoration and deep cellular recovery.

The entire blend is structurally framed as a clean, daily beverage ritual—providing 30 complete servings (Net Wt. 7.0 oz) designed to perfectly anchor the restorative evening half of the geothermal wellness system.
dual_system_subtitle: Experience the complete cycle of geothermal wellness.
dual_system_desc: Born from the earth’s raw elemental power, the Tephra Rituals Dual System is a meticulously calibrated, morning-to-night wellness cycle engineered to optimize your physical rhythm. Grounded in ancestral, full-bodied Koko Samoa, this functional duo transitions you seamlessly through the day’s demands. Volcanic Dawn activates your morning with clean, sustained physical energy and sharp mental focus, while Obsidian Bed grounds your evening, transitioning the body into a state of deep, metabolic recovery and precise neuro-glycogen sleep. Together, they offer a complete, balanced ritual of geothermal vitality from dawn until dark.
card1_flavor_desc_p1: Volcanic Dawn opens with the deep, robust bittersweetness of pure, dark-roasted Samoan Kacao, yielding a complex foundation of woodsmoke and dark molasses. This intense earthiness is immediately brightened by the warm, aromatic snap of Ceylon cinnamon and the sharp, exotic citrus-herbal notes of green cardamom. The blend rounds out with an exceptionally subtle savory finish, where mineral-rich black lava salt cuts through the bitterness, elevating the natural cacao oils and adding a fleeting, pristine oceanic crispness to the palate.
card1_flavor_desc_p2: Viscous, substantial, and incredibly smooth. The inclusion of taro root lends a velvety, natural starch thickness that mimics the luxurious body of a heavy cream latte without dairy. It coats the palate evenly, leaving a clean, non-astringent finish that feels grounding and deeply satisfying.
card2_flavor_desc_p1: Obsidian Bed offers a comforting, midnight flavor scape anchored by a plush, mellow cacao core. The dark, bittersweet notes are beautifully softened by a creamy, buttery macadamia nut infusion, creating a profile reminiscent of artisanal dark praline. Gentle sweet accents of caramelized coconut palm sugar thread through the cup, while a delicate dust of floral bee pollen adds an elusive, golden complexity. It is softly rounded off with a mild, comforting whisper of warm baking spice that warms the back of the throat.
card2_flavor_desc_p2: Pure silk and liquid luxury. This blend features a deeply soothing, heavily unctuous mouthfeel that maximizes the natural fats of the macadamia and the fine suspension of midnight cacao. It feels dense, warm, and comforting on the tongue—perfectly engineered to signal relaxation and metabolic grounding to the body as you drift toward rest.
